description: Write minimal FFI bindings to libfuse3 C API: fuse_operations struct (~40 fields, exact ABI layout), fuse_new, fuse_mount, fuse_loop, fuse_unmount, fuse_destroy, fuse_get_context. Link against libfuse3.dylib from FUSE-T. Add compile-time size assertion for fuse_operations.
title: Hand-written FFI bindings for libfuse3
